summary: Kang Hyunwoo attends a social reunion where former peers express disbelief and jealousy over his apparent newfound wealth and debt repayment. After his detractors are humbled by the sight of his luxury Porsche Panamera, Hyunwoo shifts his focus to the virtual world. He visits the champion Dakan to return an item, ultimately securing a rare reward and being goaded into a sparring match against Cancun.
key_moments: Jung Hanbaek publicly accuses Hyunwoo of lying about his financial status at a reunion.
Hyunwoo silences his critics by arriving in a Porsche Panamera, leaving them humiliated.
Hyunwoo visits the champion Dakan and completes a quest to receive the Pants of the Orc Tribe.
